description: IRC daemon (ergo) and WeeChat pane management (irc_manager.py:2)

key_interfaces.name: check_irc_connectivity
key_interfaces.description: Raise ConnectionError if IRC server unreachable via socket connect (+ optional TLS)

key_interfaces.name: IrcManager.__init__
key_interfaces.description: Initialize with config dict, state_file path, zellij session name

key_interfaces.name: IrcManager.daemon_start
key_interfaces.description: Start local ergo IRC server: generate config, patch port, inject auth-script if OIDC, launch subprocess

key_interfaces.name: IrcManager.daemon_stop
key_interfaces.description: Stop local ergo by stored PID (never kills by port to avoid hitting unrelated instances)

key_interfaces.name: IrcManager.start_weechat
key_interfaces.description: Start WeeChat in dedicated zellij tab with auto-connect to IRC server

key_interfaces.name: IrcManager.build_weechat_cmd
key_interfaces.description: Build WeeChat startup command string with server, SASL, plugin loading

key_interfaces.name: IrcManager.stop_weechat
key_interfaces.description: Stop WeeChat by sending /quit command to its pane

key_interfaces.name: IrcManager.status
key_interfaces.description: Return IRC status dict: daemon running/pid, weechat running/nick

key_interfaces.name: IrcManager._inject_auth_script
key_interfaces.description: Inject auth-script and require-sasl settings into ergo config for OIDC auth

test_results.note: 1 failed due to WSL2 network environment

user_flows.name: start IRC daemon
steps: check if port already in use
generate ergo.yaml from defaultconfig, patch port/TLS
inject auth-script if OIDC credentials exist
start ergo subprocess, verify port is listening

user_flows.name: start WeeChat
steps: check if WeeChat tab already exists
build_weechat_cmd with server config, SASL, plugin
save weechat tab/pane info to state.json
